notes: Core loop exists but has bugs (score calculation uses dead state incorrectly, dual ship triggers too easily/randomly, enemy dive paths are erratic), visuals are minimal wireframe shapes with no resemblance to actual Galaga sprites, and the overall experience feels rough and unpolished.
Core loop works but player becomes permanently invincible after one death, hitboxes are massively oversized, and graphics are Asteroids-style wireframes instead of Galaga sprites.

The build is mostly runnable with responsive controls, but it is a very loose Galaga approximation with simplistic visuals and several gameplay/logic inaccuracies such as broken dive-score handling and unrealistic dual-ship/capture behavior.
